station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Time Management (Priority: HIGH)
You appear to have written under time pressure. Start assignments early to allow time for revision and improvement.

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Engaged but Weak Writers - Good effort, needs support) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Time pressure is affecting your writing quality.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
help_seeking_examples: Good evening miss, what topic should the essay be about?
Where can I see the feedback?

Topic : Against the integretion of AI in writing. In today's fast-paced digital landscape, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) into writing processes has become increasingly prevalent. We were promised a tool, but we may have built a replacement. AI was introduced into writing as a means of assistance, yet it has quietly grown into a substitute for the very act of thinking itself. When students let algorithms construct their arguments and professionals outsource their words to machines, writing stops being a skill and becomes a transaction. The result is a generation that can prompt but cannot articulate, that can generate but cannot genuinely communicate. .Therefore, the integration of AI in writing must be critically opposed, as it systematically dismantles independent thinking, suppresses authentic human voice, and produces a society increasingly incapable of expressing its own thoughts without the aid of a machine.
recommendations: RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort
